entry_point.FQNAME: com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.MainActivityTest void app_launches_successfully()

problem.highlighted_element: @Deprecated("MEMORY LEAK: Use daysAheadChangedEvent StateFlow instead", level = DeprecationLevel.ERR...

entry_point.FQNAME: com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.StateSynchronisationTest void AuthState should use sub-states correctly()

com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.StateSynchronisationTest void sub-states should have computed properties()

com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.StateSynchronisationTest void calendar selection state should be immutable()

com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.StateSynchronisationTest void immutable data classes should have structural equality()

com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.alarm.AlarmSchedulerTest void calculate alarm time with zero lead time returns event time()
com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.alarm.AlarmSchedulerTest void calculate alarm time crossing midnight works correctly()
com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.alarm.AlarmSchedulerTest void should not schedule alarm for past events()
com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.alarm.AlarmSchedulerTest void should schedule alarm for future events()

com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.alarm.AlarmSchedulerTest void handle timezone changes correctly()
com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.alarm.AlarmSchedulerTest void filter work events correctly()
com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.alarm.AlarmSchedulerTest void handle recurring events correctly()
com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.alarm.AlarmSchedulerTest void validate alarm time is not too far in future()

com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.calendar.CalendarSyncTest void filter events within time range()
com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.calendar.CalendarSyncTest void detect work shifts correctly()
com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.calendar.CalendarSyncTest void handle recurring events with RRULE()

com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.calendar.CalendarSyncTest void validate token not expired()
com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.calendar.CalendarSyncTest void handle events without end time()
com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.calendar.CalendarSyncTest void merge duplicate events correctly()
com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.calendar.CalendarSyncTest void calculate correct lead time for different shift types()

com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.security.SecurityTest void handle decryption with wrong key gracefully()
com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.security.SecurityTest void validate key strength meets security requirements()
